MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. INTERVENOR PROPOSITION 22 LEGAL DEFENSE AND EDUCATION FUND'S Motion For Leave To Intervene: OFF CALENDAR; heard and decided on 04/08/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Hearing On Proposition 22 Legal Defense And Education Fund'S Motion To Intervene
Off Calendar Apr-08-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert H. Tyler, Esq., Alliance Defense Fund (909) 461-7860, for Moving Party Intervenor Proposition 22 Legal Defense And Education Fund
Terry L. Thompson, Esq. (925) 855-1507, for Moving Party Intervenor Proposition 22 Legal Defense And Education Fund
Ceide Zapparoni, Esq., Howard Rice Nemerovski Canady Falk & Rabkin (415) 399-3096, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party City and County of San Francisco
Scott A. Westrich, Esq., Heller Ehrman (415) 772-6000 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Woo, et al.
RULING:
A R G U E D; PROPOSITION 22 LEGAL DEFENSE AND EDUCATION FUND'S MOTION TO INTERVENE is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
